name: finadvisor-dev
description: One-command local dev launcher for FinAdvisor (API + analytics + web).

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "api,analytics,web" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,green" --prefix "[{name}]" "dotnet run --project FinAdvisor/src/FinAdvisor.Api --launch-profile http" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir src/analytics-service --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload" "npm --prefix src/web run dev"
